abilities: Looks like I consumed the dragon. (blocking Hanzo 's Dragonstrike)
Ugh, too much glare! (blocking Illari 's Captive Sun)
You're not in the forecast. (blocking Pharah 's Barrage)
Bye, bye, bye! (blocking Reaper 's Death Blossom)
Try, try, try again! (blocking Reaper 's Death Blossom)
Hey! No littering! (blocking Roadhog 's Whole Hog)
Look at you! Now look at me! (blocking Soldier: 76 's Tactical Visor)
Nothing to see here. (blocking Soldier: 76 's Tactical Visor)
Nice try, love! (blocking Tracer 's Pulse Bomb)
Hold your fire! (blocking Zarya 's Gravitron Surge)
I don't feel the attraction. (blocking Zarya 's Gravitron Surge)
chatter: Time to save the world? Game on!
I prepped all night for this mission. Well, maybe I gamed a little, too.
So... don't take it personally when I get the most kills, 'kay?
Stick together! Let me take the hits.
See you at the finish line!
The dream team! I'm the dream, you're the team!
We've got this! One more round and we win.
Minor setback, but we can still win this.
Fight's not over yet. All we have to do is win this round!
Last round! This is where it counts!
This is it! Come on, team!
Don't tilt, Hana. You got this!
I'm on fire! What else is new? ( chuckles )
They want a rematch? Bring it!
call-outs: I'm gonna mess you up! (out of mech)
Hold out and we cinch this win!
This is our win! Fight, fight, FIGHT!
This is our last chance. Let's win this thing!
Time's almost up and we need more kills!
We don't have much longer. Time to clutch this!
eliminations: I thought ninjas had good reaction time! (eliminating Genji or Kiriko )
Aw, what happened, mech slayer? (eliminating Vendetta )
That's why you're hardstuck chrome! (eliminating Wuyang )
I've got everything under control. (on low HP)
Get out of my flightpath! (eliminating airborne enemy)
That blew up in your face! (eliminating Pharah using Barrage)
Monkey-monkey-monkey-monkey! Oh, wait, we got him! (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
That was like a boss battle! (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
*screams* Get out of my game! (eliminating Nano-Boosted Genji using Dragonblade)
That was the wrong place to stand!
D.Va to the rescue, as always.
Pistol in the face! (out of mech)
Ha! Good luck climbing from down there!
Enemy turret's not going to bother us anymore!
You've been holding back on me!
interactions: Ana : Fighting battles at such a young age... I hope you remember to take time for yourself. D.Va : Sometimes. But I have so much to do. Ana : *sigh* That's always the excuse.

D.Va : I saw you on a wanted poster with a cute guy! Ashe : *sigh* Tell me you don't mean Cassidy . D.Va : Ew, no! The tall one with the little hat! Ashe : Oh, B.O.B. *chuckle* I'll tell him you said hello.
D.Va : Hey! Who took my Nano Cola ? Baptiste : That stuff's no good for you. Have some water instead. D.Va : You just want to drink it yourself! Baptiste : Ah... maybe.
D.Va : Whoa, that gun must do a ton of DPS! Bastion : ( proud beeps )
D.Va : We should get Ganymede to scout for us! Bastion : ( worried beeps ) D.Va : Don't worry! No one will touch a feather on Gany's head while Hana Song is here! Bastion : ( relieved beeps )
D.Va : I should introduce you to Dae-hyun ! He takes care of my mech when I'm back home. Brigitte : If that's true, he must have lots of experience. D.Va : Yeah, he... Hey!
Cassidy : You remind me of myself when I was younger. D.Va : Uh, I'm way cooler than you! Cassidy : That's exactly what I would've said! All you're missin' is the hat and cigar.

Cassidy : D.Va! You said you wanted to tell me more about this Pachi-Fella's friends? 1 of 2 D.Va : Yeah yeah! You remember Yachemon, right? Cassidy : Yeah. The sausage... but you said his name means vegetable man? D.Va : Because he's a vegetarian! Are you even listening?! or D.Va : Oh yeah! So there's Geranman. He's pretty new to the crew. Cassidy : Right... he's got that square around his mouth. D.Va : *frustrated sigh* It's a goatee, duh!
Doomfist : How does one so young become Korea's strongest warrior? D.Va : I'm the best. That's all you need to know. Doomfist : *laughter* Confidence! Let's hope it's not unfounded.
Echo : If you'd like, I could train with you. Facing yourself can help you improve. D.Va : Oh, finally! A balanced 1v1.
Echo : Hana, what does kimchi taste like? D.Va : It's salty and spicy and garlicky! * sigh * It's yummy fried, too. Echo : Fried? Interesting. D.Va : Aw, now I'm hungry.

D.Va : Genji! Let's go to the arcade after this. Genji : A battle's end calls for meditation. Not games. D.Va : I get it. Everyone's scared to take on the best player in the world. Genji : ...Fine. I'll go.
Hanzo : You should focus on training. You waste your time playing games. D.Va : Why don't you give them a try? Maybe then you'd frown less! Hanzo : I-- *scoffs*
Hazard : Well, if it isn't Hana Song: face of the MEKA propaganda machine. D.Va : Uh, yeah... do you want an autograph or something? Hazard : You've really bought in, haven't you? Right shame.
D.Va : Feels nice not to be the shortest person on the team anymore. Illari : I'm taller than you, and you know it. D.Va : Hmmm... Your hair doesn't count!
Junker Queen : You got a hamster in that mech? D.Va : Um... No? Junker Queen : Sure, sure... I'm watchin' you.

Junkrat : Look at us! Two superstars out and about. D.Va : Uhhhh... What? Junkrat : We should keep our heads down. Don't want the paparazzi finding us. D.Va : Riiight... It's probably risky for us to talk at all.
D.Va : Can't they get anything done without us? Kiriko : It's a full-time job being the capable ones.

Kiriko : *sigh* They discontinued my favorite moisturizer. Got any recommendations? D.Va : Eh. Sorry, I don't use creams. I just splash some water on my face and call it a day. Kiriko : What?! At least use sunscreen!
Lúcio : Alright, let's hear that fighting spirit! D.Va : Grrr! Lúcio : That's exactly what I'm talking about! Woo!
D.Va : Look at this team. We're gonna do great! *chuckle* Lúcio : Hey! That's my line! D.Va : * laugh * It sounds better when I say it!
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? D.Va : Definitely the Zergling. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mei : *sigh* I really need some new clothes. D.Va : Let me take you shopping in Seoul! I'll find you all the cutest stuff. Mei : Wait, really? I mean... wow! That Sounds fun!
D.Va : Someday, I'm going to finally travel the world! Got any tips? Mei : Um... Travel light. But you never know when you need more socks. And underwear. And shirts. Oh! And pants.

Mercy : You've been doing a lot around Gibraltar , lately. Are you taking care of yourself? D.Va : I'm fine! I put in hours like this all the time back in Korea! Mercy : * sigh * That's exactly what I'm worried about.
D.Va : How can you experiment on those those cute little rabbits? Moira : Easily.
D.Va : Being part of Overwatch, getting to save the world... isn't it awesome, Pharah? Pharah : Yeah. It is pretty awesome.
Ramattra : It is the privilege of humanity to trifle with every threat. D.Va : I give everything to protect my home. So don't trifle with me!
D.Va : You don't look so good. Maybe you should sit this one out and leave the kills to me. Reaper : I'll be fine once you shut up.
Reaper : ...What? What's your problem? D.Va : There's something... off about your vibe. Reaper : I don't have a "vibe". D.Va : Oh, that's what it is!
Reaper : War isn't a game, girl. D.Va : That's funny. * laugh * Soldier: 76 said the same thing!
D.Va : Why so serious, Reinhardt? You're supposed to be the fun one! Reinhardt : What! I am gloriously fun! D.Va : Why stop at "glorious"? Be "notorious"! Reinhardt : Ha ha, you got it!

Reinhardt : You're awfully far from home. Do you miss your friends? D.Va : Yeah. But the squad is doing great on their own! Besides, I have new friends here. Including you! Reinhardt : Wonderful! We should have a game night! I will bring the snacks!
Reinhardt : Ha ha! Now that's what I call a shatter-bomb! D.Va : Um, I think you mean... "bomb-shatter"!
D.Va : Massive bomb-shatter! Reinhardt : I still say... "shatter-bomb" has a better ring to it.
Roadhog : Cute mech . D.Va : Cute hook! Roadhog : *breathes* Thanks.

Sojourn : Did you read the mission brief? D.Va : Huh? Oh, was I supposed to read that? Sojourn : *sigh* What did I say about teamwork? D.Va : "Teamwork gets you out alive"... but homework makes me dead inside!

Sojourn : Nice MEKA . Exo-Force , right? What's that like? D.Va : Lots of fighting, not much sleep. Sojourn : Sounds familiar. How do you deal with it? D.Va : More caffeine than you'd ever believe. Sojourn : You'd be surprised.
Soldier: 76 : A mech as flashy as yours will show up on every radar. D.Va : That's just the way I like it.
Sombra : Caught your stream last night, conejita. You're not bad at those games. D.Va : "Not bad"? I'll stomp you even with your hacks. Sombra : Ay. I'll be sad when we take you out.
Sombra : Oh, they're all gone? I didn't even use my best tricks! D.Va : Come on, they're not even trying!
D.Va : I heard you're a good dancer. You should try to beat my high score in Dance Floor! Symmetra : Hm. Have you checked the scoreboard recently? D.Va : *gasp* You didn't...!
Torbjörn : How about you let me build you a new mech? D.Va : Uh... I don't know... I heard your inventions take five minutes to boot up. Torbjörn : That was once!
Tracer : Can I please fly Tokki ? I'll be super careful! D.Va : Uh, didn't you lose an entire jet once? Tracer : *giggles* Not on purpose!
Tracer : Two hot shot pilots on the same team? D.Va : The bad guys won't know what hit 'em!

D.Va : How can you be good at shooting in real life, but so bad in games? Tracer : Mmm... it's not the same thing, I guess. D.Va : *sigh* It's lonely at the top. Tracer : I could beat you at the cooking games, though.
D.Va : You should visit me in Korea, Lena. Tracer : Oh, I'd love that! D.Va : I'll show you true hospitality, Korea style. Tracer : I smell shenanigans. Sign me up!
D.Va : I have to introduce you to Overlord ! He's the best pilot I know. Tracer : Don't sell yourself short! I've seen you in action.

D.Va : Do you really call yourself a "mech slayer"? Hehe. Vendetta : I don't call myself one. I am one. Your squad must be overdue for a demonstration. D.Va : Try it! Tokki and I love crushing sweats. Overlord 's got our back! You'd never take us down. *scoffs* Are you serious? Casino would fly circles around you! With King on our team, you don't stand a chance! Ha! No way! D.Mon 's way better with a sword than you!
Widowmaker : You claim you are skilled. That remains to be seen. D.Va : What's that? You're hiding so far in the backline, I can barely hear you!
Winston : Anyone wanna hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? D.Va : ..."Na". *chuckle* Winston : *chuckles*

D.Va : Winston, I have to get a picture with you! Winston : Uh... with me ? D.Va : Duh! My fans love hearing about you! Let's get a selfie the next time we're patching up my mech! Winston : I... sure! Sounds like fun!
D.Va : I bet you're a pro at bowling! Wrecking Ball : The hamster says, "No comment." D.Va : Aw! Who am I going to go with now? Wrecking Ball : Tuesdays are usually free.

Wuyang : Hey, you're that famous Mecha Guardian Player, right? Could you train me? D.Va : What rank are you? Top 1000. Wuyang : I've been stuck in... Chrome for a while, but I think I'm really close to ranking up. D.Va : Right. I'll ask Dae-Hyun if he has time.
D.Va : You're crazy strong, Zarya! How many of me could you lift? Zarya : With or without the mech ?
D.Va : Can Volskaya's mechs do that? Zarya : Hah. Not yet.
Zenyatta : There is much to admire about a rebellious spirit. Questioning tradition is how new tradition is formed. D.Va : Oh, that's good! I'll use that the next time Sojourn gives me trouble.
map-specific: If they destroy any of my favorite matjips, I'm coming for them!
It's nice being on home turf!
*sigh* The paparazzi better not get in my way!
Let's sneak in a trip to the beach after this. I won't tell if you don't!
Tokki can jump over Big Ben, no problem!
Why stop at making it here? I'm thinking more global.
This city always smells like melted butter! And rats.
A MEKA roadtrip would be jonla fun!
